creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tijl
Date: Fri Jan 13 12:02:50 UTC 2017
New revision: 431369
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/431369

Log:
  Update nvidia driver to 375.26 and legacy drivers to 340.101 and 304.134.

  This brings official support for FreeBSD 11 and Xorg server 1.19.

  PR:		215370
  Submitted by:	kbowling
  Approved by:	danfe (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/x11/nvidia-driver/Makefile
  head/x11/nvidia-driver/distinfo
  head/x11/nvidia-driver/pkg-plist
  head/x11/nvidia-driver-304/Makefile
  head/x11/nvidia-driver-340/Makefile
